items.title: From training run to registered model
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  train["Training job"] --> run["Run with experiment ID"]
  run --> logs["Params, metrics, artifacts"]
  run --> tag["Tags e.g. candidate"]
  logs --> reg["Model registry version"]
  reg --> staging["Staging"]
  staging --> prod["Production"]
items.caption: Each training job creates a uniquely identified run; promising artifacts are registered and promoted through stages while keeping lineage to the source run.

items.title: Comparing multiple runs
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  filter["Filter by tags or date"] --> select["Select run IDs"]
  select --> table["Side-by-side params and metrics"]
  table --> pick["Pick winner"]
  pick --> register["Register artifact"]
items.caption: Comparison starts with a consistent filter, aligns runs on the same logged fields, then feeds the chosen run into registration.
